title: Flory-Huggins Polymer Solution Theory Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: DG_mix = RT * (phi_A/N_A * ln(phi_A) + phi_B/N_B * ln(phi_B) + chi * phi_A * phi_B)
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Flory-Huggins Polymer Solution Theory

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=12) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class Common-tangent construction for binodal; nonlinear fit for chi(T) provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
